items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step regarding the waitlist scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the persona scenario of waiting for sold-out group events, but the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from the simulation. While the linked use case discusses a waitlist optimization plugin, it does not confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a failure report. Therefore, the lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive result regarding the validation of this scenario.
